title: ステイヤーズSの後に・メジロの大計

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text:
Mejiro Bright completes the Stayers Stakes,
proving that she has come into her own.

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text:
Along with her victories in the Satsuki Sho and
Kikuka Sho, she's performed well in both medium
and long-distance races. To Grandmother Mejiro,
this is a sign of Mejiro Bright's versatility.

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text:
Mejiro Bright walks along a glittering, starry path,
carrying the family's hopes beyond the limit their
founder had reached.

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text:
Her resolve is renewed to run in the spring Tenno
Sho, the race most important to the Mejiro
family.
